post.description: Creates a fresh session either via a username and password, or via a refresh token (which becomes invalidated after this request).

Set-Cookie.description: An HTTP-Only cookie called `lockinspiel-refresh` will contain the refresh token.

delete.description: Logs out of the currently authenticated user (invalidates the current session)

Set-Cookie.description: An HTTP-Only cookie called `lockinspiel-refresh` will contain the refresh token.

token.description:
If the refresh token is null, it's assumed that the token
will be provided via a cookie

refresh_cookie.name: lockinspiel-refresh
refresh_cookie.description: An HTTP-Only cookie issued on signup and login
